description: Context recipe for AIWizard mini-app (single-file HTML) generation. Lighter than the macOS-app recipe — no framework scaffold (mini-apps are self-contained HTML). v2 added active-memory layer (Phase MA.3). v3 added excludeTitlePatterns to drop CCAA / AgentRuntime / ScheduledJob log spam from retrieval results. v4 (2026-04-18): added wisdom-framework layer at priority 85 with its own 3500-token budget so framework-specific packs (card-games, arcade-games, visual-quality, etc.) get a dedicated slot instead of competing with universal rules in a single 2500-token pool. Root cause of mini-app quality plateau: the card-games pack alone is 19k+ raw bytes and was being truncated out of the wisdom-universal layer, so generated Hearts/Blackjack/Poker mini-apps missed critical layout and color rules.
